data_source: TradingView MCP data_get_ohlcv (full available 5m depth = 302 bars)
VERDICT: SAMPLE TOO SMALL FOR VALIDATION (n_trades 0-3). Results below are NOT statistically meaningful — recorded only to confirm engine correctness and relative filter behavior.
observations_unvalidated: Full ICT filter stack (killzone+bias+fib+sweep+fvg) is so restrictive it yields 0 trades on 1 day of 5m. Under-trading, not over-trading, is the failure mode at this sample size.
Killzone (NY AM 7-11 ET) likely excludes most of the 25h window -> primary cause of 0 trades.
Cannot rank filters or accept/reject H1-H4 until sample is 100x larger.
